tier_scale: paldb.cc rank: -3..-1 detrimental, 1..4 positive, 5 = new 1.0 'World Tree' gold tier (weight 5, not in wild random pool)

passives.name: Twin-Edged Holy Blade
passives.effects: Attack +50%, Defense -30%, World Tree resources will not vanish when approached.

passives.name: Sanctified Meat Shield
passives.effects: Defense +50%, Attack -30%, World Tree resources will not vanish when approached.

passives.name: Demon's Hand
passives.effects: Work Speed +90%, SAN dreceases +15.0% faster, World Tree harvestables won't vanish when approached.

passives.name: World Tree Seedbed
passives.effects: Decrease Hunger depletion rate by +50.0%, HP -20%, World Tree resources will not vanish when approached.

passives.name: Hermit Sage
passives.effects: SAN depletion rate -50.0%, Work Speed -20%, World Tree resources will not vanish when approached.

passives.name: Dimensional Leap
passives.effects: Movement Speed +50%, Increases Hunger depletion rate by +15.0%, World Tree resources will not vanish when approached.

passives.name: God of Destruction
passives.effects: Attack +40%, Defense +20%, Max Health -50%, World Tree resources will not vanish when approached.

passives.name: Diamond Body
passives.effects: Defense +30%, Immune to Flinch, Immune to Knockback

passives.name: Siren of the Void
passives.effects: 30% increase in Dark attack damage., 30% increase in Ice attack damage.

passives.name: Eternal Flame
passives.effects: 30% increase to Fire attack damage., 30% increase to Lightning attack damage.

passives.name: Invader
passives.effects: 30% increase in Dark attack damage., 30% increase in Dragon attack damage.

passives.name: Eternal Engine
passives.effects: Max stamina +75%, *This effect is only valid for rideable pals.

passives.name: Vampiric
passives.effects: Absorbs a portion of the damage dealt to restore Health., Does not sleep at night and continues to work.

passives.name: Lunker
passives.effects: 20% increase to Water attack damage, 20% increase to Ice attack damage, 20% increase to defense.

passives.name: Savior
passives.effects: 30% increase in Neutral attack damage., 30% increase in Grass attack damage.

passives.name: Babysitter
passives.effects: While at a base, increases egg production speed by +30% and incubation speed by +30% for Pals assigned to a Breeding Farm.
passives.notes: Мутационная (радужная): первично — только из МУТАЦИОННОГО яйца (шанс: Cake 1% / Vegetable Cake 2% / Extravagant Vegetable Cake 3%). Дальше НАСЛЕДУЕТСЯ обычным бридингом как пассивка родителя (Special Cake повышает шанс передачи). С Yakumo «Birds of a Feather» не работает.

passives.name: Idiosyncratic
passives.effects: Pal and Player Auto Health Regeneration Rate +50%, Defense +25%, Immune to Poison Damage, Immune to Burn Damage
passives.notes: Мутационная (радужная): первично — только из МУТАЦИОННОГО яйца (шанс: Cake 1% / Vegetable Cake 2% / Extravagant Vegetable Cake 3%). Дальше НАСЛЕДУЕТСЯ обычным бридингом как пассивка родителя (Special Cake повышает шанс передачи). С Yakumo «Birds of a Feather» не работает.

passives.name: Immortality
passives.effects: Life Steal +5%, Pal Auto Health Regeneration Rate +100%, Attack +15%
passives.notes: Мутационная (радужная): первично — только из МУТАЦИОННОГО яйца (шанс: Cake 1% / Vegetable Cake 2% / Extravagant Vegetable Cake 3%). Дальше НАСЛЕДУЕТСЯ обычным бридингом как пассивка родителя (Special Cake повышает шанс передачи). С Yakumo «Birds of a Feather» не работает.

passives.notes: Мутационная (радужная): первично — только из МУТАЦИОННОГО яйца (шанс: Cake 1% / Vegetable Cake 2% / Extravagant Vegetable Cake 3%). Дальше НАСЛЕДУЕТСЯ обычным бридингом как пассивка родителя (Special Cake повышает шанс передачи). С Yakumo «Birds of a Feather» не работает.

passives.name: Skymarcher
passives.notes: Мутационная (радужная): первично — только из МУТАЦИОННОГО яйца (шанс: Cake 1% / Vegetable Cake 2% / Extravagant Vegetable Cake 3%). Дальше НАСЛЕДУЕТСЯ обычным бридингом как пассивка родителя (Special Cake повышает шанс передачи). С Yakumo «Birds of a Feather» не работает.

passives.name: Philanthropist
passives.effects: When assigned to a Breeding Farm, breeding speed is increased by 100%.

passives.name: Infinite Stamina
passives.effects: Max stamina +50%, *This effect is only valid for rideable pals.

passives.name: Noble
passives.effects: Increases the value of items when sold by +5%

passives.name: Insomnia
passives.effects: Does not sleep and continues to work even at night.

passives.name: Fit as a Fiddle
passives.effects: Max stamina +25%, *This effect is only valid for rideable pals.

passives.name: Fine Furs
passives.effects: Increases the value of items when sold by +3%

passives.name: Otherworldly Cells
passives.effects: Attack +10%, Fire damage reduction 15%, Lightning damage reduction 15%

passives.name: Mercy Hit
passives.effects: Pacifist., Will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

passives.name: Sickly
passives.effects: Max Stamina -25%, *This effect is only valid for rideable pals.

passives.name: Shabby
passives.effects: Decrease the value of items when sold by -10%

passives.name: Night Owl
passives.effects: Tends to nap through the day, due to being nocturnal.

notes: Primary source is paldb.cc's 'Pal Passive Skills /114' tab (1.0 data). paldb also has an extended 298-entry tab, but the extra 184 entries are gear/accessory/sphere-module/NPC-boss effects, not obtainable pal passives; they are excluded here.
tier uses paldb's rank scale: -3..-1 detrimental, 1..4 positive, 5 = new 1.0 gold 'World Tree' tier.

'native_pals' (extra field) lists pals that always spawn with a passive that is ALSO in the wild random pool (e.g. Heavyweight on Kingpaca) - these are not exclusives. 'exclusive_source' is reserved for passives absent from the random pool.
'lucky_pal_pool': true marks Lucky as rolled only by rare/shiny ('lucky') wild pals (paldb 'RarePal' pool tag).

Weight field on paldb: most pool passives are Weight 100; the new 1.0 additions (Remarkable Craftsmanship, Demon God, Diamond Body, Swift, Eternal Engine, Vampiric, Mastery of Fasting, Heart of the Immovable King, King of the Waves, Lavish Hospitality, Ranch Master, Lightfooted) are Weight 5, i.e. rare random rolls.

CONFLICT vs docs/breeding_mechanics.md section 9: the doc's game8 table lists element Emperor/Lord passives at +20%; paldb 1.0 shows 30% for all nine (Celestial/Flame/Ice/Earth/Spirit Emperor, Lord of Lightning/the Sea/the Underworld, Divine Dragon). Doc's +30% values for Eternal Flame/Invader/Siren of the Void match paldb.

CONFLICT vs docs/breeding_mechanics.md section 10: doc claims Eternal Engine = 'Move Speed +75%, Attack +20%, Max Stamina +75%' (PRELIMINARY tag); paldb 1.0 shows only 'Max stamina +75% (rideable pals only)'. Doc value looks wrong or outdated.
Doc's Legend 'Move Speed +15-20%' resolves to exactly +20% per paldb.

Doc values confirmed by paldb: Demon God (Atk +30%, Def +5%), Remarkable Craftsmanship (WS +75%), Musclehead, Ferocious, Burly Body, Lucky, Hooligan (Atk +15%, WS -10%), Conceited (WS +10%, Def -10%), Artisan, Work Slave, Serious, Swift/Runner/Nimble, Vanguard, Stronghold Strategist, Motivational Leader, Mine/Logging Foreman.
Lord of the Underworld is native to both Necromus and Frostallion Noct per paldb (doc lists only Necromus).

Legend is native to 6 pals in 1.0: Paladius, Necromus, Frostallion, Frostallion Noct, Jetragon, and new legendary Neptilius (which also has exclusive Lunker). Hartalis has exclusive Savior; Xenolord has Invader; Otherworldly Cells is native to the Xeno line (Xenovader/Xenogard/Xenolord).

The seven tier-5 'World Tree' passives (Twin-Edged Holy Blade, Sanctified Meat Shield, Demon's Hand, World Tree Seedbed, Hermit Sage, Dimensional Leap, God of Destruction) all carry 'World Tree resources will not vanish when approached' and Weight 5, and are NOT in the wild pool. These are the best candidates for the 'mutation-exclusive' passives mentioned in docs/breeding_mechanics.md section 7 (which says FIVE) - count and acquisition method unconfirmed.
Mercy Hit is granted by items (Ring of Mercy, Pal Tamers Glasses) per paldb's source links, though it is also tagged as being in the pal pool.
palworld.gg cross-check: 54 of its 58 listed pal passives overlap this set; 0 numeric conflicts. Its remaining 4 (Aerial Dash +1..+4) are gear effects.

Мутационно-эксклюзивные пассивки (breedable=false, mutation_exclusive=true): Babysitter, Idiosyncratic, Immortality, Heavily Armored, Skirmisher — из обычного пула родителей не наследуются, только через мутацию (PRELIMINARY 1.0).
gaps: Mutation-exclusive passive names unconfirmed: docs say five unique mutation passives exist; paldb does not label any passive as mutation-sourced. The seven tier-5 World Tree passives are the likely set (breedable=null on them).
Acquisition source unknown (not in wild pool, no exclusive pal listed) for: Babysitter, Idiosyncratic, Immortality, Heavily Armored, Skymarcher - possibly raid/expedition/research or event rewards.
Breedability of tier-5 World Tree passives and of the five unknown-source tier-4 passives above is unverified (null).

Inheritance behavior of species-exclusive passives beyond Legend/Emperors (e.g. Savior, Lunker, Invader, Siren of the Void, Eternal Flame) assumed breedable=true by analogy with Legend; not individually verified.
game8/fandom/wiki.gg could not be fetched (bot-blocked) - no third-source verification of the 1.0 numeric changes (e.g. Emperor 20%->30%).

sources.what: primary: full 114-passive 1.0 list with ranks, effect values, weights, pool tags, native/exclusive pal links (+ extended 298-entry gear/NPC tab, excluded)
cross-check: 58 passives with rank + effect text; 54 overlap, 0 numeric conflicts
checked for mutation-exclusive passive names; confirms mutated pals get a unique passive but names not listed
